title: Insane's Survival Overhaul (aka IguanaTweaks Reborn)
description: Overhaul survival with many changes to existing mechanics. Weapon rebalance, and much more
body:
Completely revamp survival by changing many features, from tools being viable weapons, to hunger, to the early game, to enchanting … Check [Insane's Survival Extra](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iguanatweaks-expanded) if you want more! You can find early versions for 1.21.1 on [Patreon](https://patreon.com/insane96mcp)!
Re-branding of Iguana Tweaks: (the mod has been removed from the forums for some reasons, [check here with the WayBack Machine the original forum post](https://web.archive.org/web/20181126012824/https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1291466-1-6-x-iguana-tweaks), or check Parker8283's port here: [https://minecraft.curseforge.com/projects/iguana-tweaks](https://minecraft.curseforge.com/projects/iguana-tweaks) )
**Features include**: * Tiredness mechanic * Rebalanced tools and weapons * Nerfed Bonemeal * Nerfed Animals * Better Beacon and Conduit * Less stacked foods * Better Explosions * Reworked Experience (check video below) * Slower Deep Mining * [**And much much more! Click here to check all the features!**](https://www.insane96.eu/projects/mods/insanesurvivaloverhaul/) **Also checkout these other mods for more features:** * [**No Hunger**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/insane-no-hunger): Removes hunger and adds a different healing mechanic similar to Minecraft Beta * [**Serene Seasons**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/serene-seasons): Seasons affect much stuff like crops growth, saplings drops and animals * [**Stamina**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/insane-stamina): No more infinite running * [**Desire Paths**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/desire-path) * [**Mobs Properties Randomness**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mobs-properties-randomness): ISO has a data pack that uses MPR to buff mobs. If [Pehkui](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pehkui) is installed mobs also get different sizes and scarier spiders * [**Enhanced AI**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enhanced-ai): Make mobs an actual threat [![BisectHosting](https://i.imgur.com/4FbAAa6.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/Insane) Check the sidebar for Discord and other links --> ## Public modpack permissions Go on, as long as uses CF or Modrinth launchers
